book.title_en: A Glass Bridge Between Two Worlds
book.title_ja: ビーズの魔法：ムラノと京都をつなぐガラスの橋
book.author: Maurizio Lotter

system_axis.narrative_logic: each scene is a spatial threshold: furnace, workshop, city, bead, necklace — five configurations of the same encounter between two traditions

editorial_principle: The scenes are not narrative segments but spatial thresholds. Each location is not a place but a condition of perception in which Murano and Kyoto coexist without synthesis.

scene_types.furnace_field: originary thermal field of glass transformation
scene_types.workshop_field: operative field of transmission and practice
scene_types.city_field: urban field of cultural exchange and encounter
scene_types.body_field: final integration field where object becomes lived experience

scenes.label: fornace_murano
scenes.basho: the Murano furnace is not origin in a linear sense but permanent active condition: every later scene presupposes this thermal field as structural memory
scenes.kokyu: the rhythm is irreversible thermodynamics: heating, shaping, cooling — the moment passes and cannot be repeated
scenes.yūgen: Murano fire as the latent horizon of all glass culture in the book — always present even when absent

affects.scene-02: thermal origin enables displacement into Kyoto without loss of technique

scenes.textual_anchor_en: From the blazing furnaces of Murano
scenes.textual_anchor_ja: ムラノの燃えさかる炉から

scenes.label: laboratorio_kyoto
scenes.basho: Kyoto is not translation of Murano but a parallel operational field where the same technique produces different temporal behavior
scenes.kokyu: the rhythm is decelerated craft temporality: repetition becomes meditation, precision becomes silence
scenes.yūgen: Kyoto as structural counter-field: not opposition but coexistence with Murano across distance

affects.scene-03: Kyoto field enables displacement of object into circulation (gift event)

scenes.textual_anchor_en: to the serene workshops of Kyoto

scenes.label: venezia_incontro
scenes.basho: Venice is a circulation field where objects detach from production and enter social transmission — the bead becomes communicable form
scenes.kokyu: encounter rhythm is discontinuous: speech → gesture → transfer → interruption → pocketing
scenes.yūgen: the gift exists as unprocessed perception: its meaning is delayed and migrates into another time

affects.scene-04: delayed perception activates domestic field of recognition

scenes.textual_anchor_en: I met Maurizio Lotter last year in Venice.
scenes.textual_anchor_ja: 私は昨年ヴェネツィアでマウリツィオ・ロッテル氏と出会いました。

scenes.label: como_rivelazione
scenes.basho: Como is not geographical return but perceptual deceleration field where object becomes readable for the first time
scenes.kokyu: revelation rhythm is delay-based cognition: distance produces clarity, immediacy produces opacity
scenes.yūgen: the bead reveals itself through attention rather than description — especially in the gesture of immediate bodily attraction

non_integrable_residue.description: the instant desire to wear the bead cannot be translated into interpretation — it is direct field activation

affects.scene-05: perceptual recognition activates embodiment of the object

scenes.textual_anchor_en: Back in Como, while recounting the highlights of my Venetian stay, I remembered the gift.
scenes.textual_anchor_ja: コモに戻り、ヴェネツィア滞在の思い出を語っていると、彼からの贈り物を思い出しました。

scenes.label: collana_corpo
scenes.basho: the body is the final field: the bead ceases to be object and becomes perceptual extension of the wearer across multiple geographies simultaneously
scenes.kokyu: wearing rhythm is continuous presence: no beginning or end, only sustained contact between skin and cultural memory
scenes.yūgen: the necklace is not worn object but distributed field of Murano-Kyoto condensed into corporeal continuity

affects.scene-01: embodiment retroactively activates furnace as lived memory rather than origin

scenes.textual_anchor_en: She wished to wear it immediately and asked me to thread it onto one of her necklaces.
scenes.textual_anchor_ja: 彼女はすぐに身につけたかったので、ネックレスに通してほしいと私に頼みました。

system_note.narrative_model: five irreversible spatial thresholds forming a single distributed perception system
system_note.global_effect: all scenes function as a single coupled perceptual system rather than linear progression
